titleStmt.title: SII 27.102: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 102. (A.R. No. 315 of 1931-32.) NAḌŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This registers a gift of land in Naḍa-ūru to god Gōpināthadēva of Paṭasāligēri by Chaṇḍarasa-voḍeya who was governing Bārakūrurājya. This gift was made in lieu of gold previously granted to the god in the time of the Tuḷuva kings.
It is dated Śaka 1354 (current), Virōdhikṛit, Chaitra śu. 1, Wednesday corresponding to 1431 A.D., March 14.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataE namaḥ śrī kōṭināthāyanamaḥ nirvighnamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi
caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svasti
śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1354 neya varttamāna virōdhikrutu saṁvatsarada cayi
1. Small letters after this and in the next line are in Tamil.

tra śu 1 bu Ū śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa dēvarāya ma
rāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadaliddu Ekachyatradiṁ sakaḷa sāṁbrājyavanu prati
pālisuva kāladalū Avara nirūpadiṁ caṁḍarasa voḍeyarū bārakūralu rājya
vanū pratipālisuva kāladalū paṭasāligēriya śrī gōpīnātha dēvarige prāku pra
māṇinalū tuḷuvarasugaḷa kālamodalāgi Utāravāgi Amratapaḍige naḍauralū na
ḍadu bahahoṁnige barada śāsana krama veṁteṁdare naḍalaūra bāḷa catusīmeya vivara
mūḍalu kaṁṇārana gaḍiyiṁdalū naḍaūra heggaḍeya Aḷiyaṁdira gaḍiyiṁda
lu paḍuvalu teṁkalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beḷārana baḷiyavara
ttina hoḷe sahita mūḍalu baḍagalu beḷārana baḷiyavara bayala gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
Abeya baḷiyavara hakkala gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yaṁtī catusīmeya vo
ḷaguḷa koḷakeya gade 1 hudubana gade 1 vaḍugaṇa baḷi gade 1 saṁkada bāḷiya
kaṭṭina gade 1 Adaṟa vottina koravi 1 kaṭṭina modala gade 1
neya bāgila gade 1 Avottina makkiyagade 1
lu nāgaṁḍugadalū bayalu mūḍe 10
muḍe 22 Akṣaradalū Ippattavodu mūḍe gadde
niḍilu holanela nidhinikṣēpajala
bhōga tēja svāṁmyavinuḷaṁthādanū gāgi śrī gōpīnātha dēvarige
Amrutapaḍige naḍadu bahamūḍe
ge śrī matu la
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
